text: I stand at the threshold between quiet potential and energetic expression. In the open space, with its scattered beanbags and quiet lighting, I sense a contemplative calm—a readiness for possibility. Walking forward, I discover the R+D wall, which draws me into a world focused on innovation and experimentation. Surrounded by creative artifacts and glowing screens, my curiosity stirs. I feel inspired and alert, aware that this environment invites me to reflect on the interplay between technology and humanity. I am both an observer and a participant, gently propelled by the energy of ideas.
